arts.ttl: Barcelona Chief Drops Major Hint on €35M-Rated Liverpool, PSG Target’s Future
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong’s future at Barcelona remains uncertain as he enters the final year of his contract. If no extension is agreed upon by this summer, a transfer could be on the table. Back in October, SPORT reported that several top clubs—including Manchester United, Chelsea, Bayern Munich, and Paris Saint-Germain—are closely monitoring his situation.
